string 2: I'm finally ready for my showdown with the immortal steed!

The immortal steed gallops freely across the sky, so beware
of attacks from all angles.
Okay, I'm ready, but... I can't fly, though...
{next}Okay, wait here.
{next}Can you fly, Plutomon?
{next}You just need to believe in yourself.

The whole reason I came to the underworld was to try and
gain confidence...

This place is essentially my backyard. Although I cannot
fly, I can float.

What good will that do me?! It's not like it'll help me grow
wings or anything!

I suppose I am strong enough to help one of you float in the
air. What do you say?

Um, I-I'm scared of flying... I think I'll leave it to you,
then.
In that case, I suppose it is up to us...

I'll be fighting that horse with you in spirit, so good luck
to you out there!

Ah, Plutomon and... Wait. I have not seen you around here
before.

This one has come here to defeat you in order to test his
strength.

Eh?! Why would I even entertain such a pointless waste of my
time?!
{next}We request the honor of dueling you.
{next}How can we get you to fight?
{next}I just got caught up in all of this...

Well, if you put it that way... You can still forget it!
What is in it for me?!

There is nothing to be gained from fighting you. What would
you offer me if I won?

Is that supposed to change my mind?! I hate spineless
weaklings!

How about this? If you defeat us, I shall bequeath you a
portion of the underworld.

You will what?! Hmm... Yes, I suppose that is a suitable
prize for my precious time.

I never liked you, so I will savor this victory and becoming
ruler of the underworld!

Tch! I will take a short rest before resuming our challenge!
Farewell!

They fled to the castle, as planned. Craniamon should be
able to join the fight now.

I shall meet up with Craniamon and head to the castle. You
may join us there.
Damn it! You called in reinforcements! Curse you cowards!

This horse seems to be quite wild... I think I'm in for a
real fight here.

That is rather big armor for such a little runt. I loathe
puny pretenders such as you!
{next}You've got this, Craniamon!
{next}Remember, Enbarrmon is at home in the sky.
{next}There's no shame in trying, at least!

You're right! I was seeking a worthy challenge, and I've
definitely found one!

Worried I'm at a disadvantage? Don't be. This is a good test
of my strength!

Hey, whose side are you on, anyway? You make it sound like
I've already lost.

Okay, I'm ready! This immortal steed is about to know the
taste of steel!

Ah, it is nice to see you have some fight in you. Very well.
Show me what you can do!
D-Did I win...? Did I defeat the immortal steed?

Well, you definitely had some help... Still, it was an
enjoyable battle nonetheless.

Ah, I see that Enbarrmon has accepted you as worthy. That
should restore your confidence.
{next}Good for you.
{next}I think I see a budding friendship here.
{next}Hopefully, you're done horsing around.

Yes, I'm somewhat more confident now. It's all thanks to
Enbarrmon here.

Hey! What do you mean by that?! I would never be friends
with one such as you!

That wasn't meant to be a lame horse pun, was it? I hope
you're better than that...
Here. You may ride upon my back.

You should be proud. Enbarrmon only bestows such an honor
upon those they deem worthy.
It is proof of your strength. Go ahead and mount the steed.

Thank you, Enbarrmon. I vow to fight in a way that won't
bring shame on us.

Shall we have ourselves a test ride, then? Brace yourself...
Here we gooooo!
Yes, please!
Oh, such speed! It's like we're one with the wind itself!

Whew... You need to go on a diet. Or maybe I just need to
get stronger.

With Enbarrmon, now I can fly through the sky. I feel more
powerful than ever!

Thanks for all of your help! With this trusty steed here,
I'm ready for action!
{next}You're welcome.
{next}I wish you and the Royal Knights luck.
{next}Someday, you'll be able to fight on your own.

That was quite the journey. I suppose I'd better return to
the rendezvous point now.

Oh, right! I forgot about my primary mission! I need to get
back to the rendezvous point!

True. I can't rely on Enbarrmon forever. Okay, let's get
back to the rendezvous pointt!

I planned to rebuke Enbarrmon for their recent rampage, but
this was a pleasant surprise.

I suppose I shall reward you for your efforts. Do you have
any requests?
{next}I could use a horse.
{next}Do you want to be friends?
{next}Can I have your autograph?

You also want a horse? Sorry, but the only one I can
introduce you to is Enbarrmon.

You must be joking. We live in different worlds. Some things
are not meant to be.

What do you mean? You wish for me to write my name? What is
the value in that?

As I am unable to grant your request, I instead
present you the following...
Here. This is now yours.
Well, I suppose we should head to the rendezvous point.

Do not bring shame upon yourself in battle, or else you will
have to answer to me.

Thanks for helping me the other day. Would you like to play
some cards as a break?
Sure.
{end}No, thanks.
I'll show you how the Royal Knights approach a battle!

I find card games can be... How can I put this? Come! You
must serve as my opponent!
Sure.
{end}No, thanks.

Let us begin! I absolutely hate to lose, even if it is just
a game!
